mapper.insert: insert into board (user_id, subject, content, hit, register_time, bullet) values (#{userId}, #{subject}, #{content}, 0, now(), #{bullet})
mapper.update: update board set subject = #{subject}, content = #{content} where article_no = #{articleNo}
mapper.select: select b.article_no, b.user_id, b.subject, b.content, b.hit, b.register_time, m.user_name, b.bullet from board b, user m where b.user_id = m.user_id
mapper.update: update board set hit = hit + 1 where article_no = #{articleNo}
mapper.select: select b.article_no, b.user_id, b.subject, b.content, b.hit, b.register_time, m.user_name, b.bullet from board b inner join user m on b.user_id = m.user_id where b.subject like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%')
